A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving credit-card-accepting businesses, the agent’s execute_python step set a dummy category='Business' for all records (ignoring actual categories) and aggregated across this single bucket, so it never computed the true top category (e.g., Restaurant) or its rating as required.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
